untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external 'guru list consensus' tracking (≥85% agreement among named analysts) and independent fundamental factor identification (≥2 factors). These require data sources and qualitative analysis external to price/volume indicators. The price_pos_20 proxy captures low directional conviction, but cannot encode: (1) guru consensus percentages, (2) fundamental factor validation, or (3) explicit 2-bar directional confirmation threshold. A production implementation requires a custom data feed and sentiment/fundamental module.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used price_pos_20 (Donchian position) to detect ranging/low-conviction regimes where contrarian trades are most viable. Entry at extremes (near lower/upper channel) represents the low price movement condition. Exit conditions use Donchian breakouts (>5% proxy) to represent consensus shift. Manual fundamental factor validation and guru consensus monitoring required outside backtest engine.
